name: Hegins Valley Lines
principals: David L. Schlegel (President, retired/deceased Oct 2025); operates DBA Schlegel Transportation Co
recent_news: Founder/owner David L. Schlegel passed away October 9, 2025 — significant succession event for a single-owner family operator (Legacy.com obituary, 2025).
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: PA in-footprint, single family owner just passed away (Oct 2025) creating immediate succession opportunity, 26-bus fleet with steady Tri-Valley SD contract plus charter capacity. Heirs may be open to a sale; size fits Summit's tuck-in profile.

name: William W Mercer Inc
principals: Daniel Mercer (Owner, per source list); historical Mercer's Bus Transportation references in Corry PA
districts_or_customers: Likely Corry Area School District and surrounding NW PA districts
recent_news: No material M&A or news found; FMCSA snapshot shows active interstate carrier, 37 trucks / 37 drivers, email schoolbus@worldconnx.net (bubba.ai 2025).
fit_notes: Plausible tuck-in: small family-owned PA school bus operator in Summit's footprint with ~37 buses serving Corry-area districts. Limited public info — would require outbound diligence to confirm ownership age, contracts, and willingness to transact.

name: American International Bus CRP
recent_news: No company website, news, FMCSA record, or NYC DOE OPT contractor listing surfaced under this name. Address (315 E 86th St) is a residential/retail Upper East Side block — suggests a very small dispatch/shell entity rather than a fleet operator with a yard.
fit_notes: Weak target. Cannot confirm it is an active independent yellow-bus operator; UES residential address and absence from NYC OPT/SchoolBusFleet lists suggest either a defunct/inactive shell or a charter middleman. Deprioritize pending direct verification.

name: Atlantic Express Comms
owner_or_parent: Atlantic Express Transportation Corp (defunct, Chapter 11 filed Nov 2013, shut down end of 2013)
principals: Domenic Gatto (former CEO, Atlantic Express Transportation Corp)
districts_or_customers: Formerly NYC DOE, ~104 districts across NY/MA/CA/PA; ceased operations 2013
recent_news: Atlantic Express filed Chapter 11 in November 2013 and shut down by end of 2013 after union vote rejection (School Bus Fleet, STN, NY World, Wikipedia). Was 4th–5th largest US school bus contractor with 5,000+ buses. No longer an operating entity.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET. Defunct since 2013; 75 Maiden Lane is a generic Lower Manhattan office tower (likely a legacy registered-agent / remnant filing address). Drop from active outreach — record was reanimated from stale DOT/Yellow Pages data.

name: Rico's Bus Co Inc
principals: Owner not publicly identified; PA Bus Corp incorporated 28-Jan-2013
districts_or_customers: Likely East Stroudsburg Area SD and/or Stroudsburg Area SD and surrounding Monroe County PA
recent_news: No M&A/news identified. PA business entity active; registered office change filed April 2014. Address (541 Cornerstone/Magnolia Ln, East Stroudsburg) appears residential-style — small owner-operator profile.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~24 employees, small fleet) independent PA operator in Summit footprint; potentially attractive only as a bolt-on if it holds a Monroe County school contract. Requires direct outreach to identify owner ('Rico') and confirm it is a yellow-bus contractor vs. coach/charter.
